subject: Reduce VGPR pressure by interleaving LDS loads with MACs
description: Rewrite the compute section of the kernel to process one depth slice (d) at a time: load input_reg for that d, compute MACs for that d, then reuse the same registers for the next d. This reduces input_reg from [KD][KH][KWR][KW_PACK] to [KH][KWR][KW_PACK], saving ~30 VGPRs.
activeForm: Rewriting kernel to interleave loads and MACs
